_publications._publicationTitle: Effects of Neurod1 Expression on Mouse and Human Schwannoma Cells.

_contextSnippet: The data showed that the Rosa26 driven levels of cre can be detected with this approach and match the levels of expression of Neurod1 driven of the Rosa26 locus
details: Rosa26 driven levels of cre can be detected with in situ hybridization and match the levels of expression of Neurod1 driven off the Rosa26 locus
